uiDesignGuidelines.title: You can use the SAP Fiori elements for OData V4 building blocks to create a visual representation of your data in a convenient way.
You can use the Field building block to instantiate a property configured as part of the service metadata in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the Form building block to instantiate a form based on a FieldGroup annotation in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the FormElement building block to add a label and visibility control to a field inside a form in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the Table building block to instantiate a table based on an entitySet or a specific navigation property in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can user the FilterBar building block to add a filter bar to your application in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the FilterField building block to add custom XML fragments as filter fields in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the MicroChart building block to render different types of micro charts in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the Chart building block to render a chart based on an entitySet or a specific navigation property in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the FlexibleColumnLayoutActions to instantiate the flexible column layout buttons in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the Share building block to add the Share functionality to an app in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the Paginator building block to add paginator buttons to lists in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the TreeTable building block to create tables with hierarchical data in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the VariantManagement building block to enable variant management for any flex-enabled control in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the RichTextEditor building block in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the Page building block to create a custom page with a predefined layout in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the MessageButton building block to show bound messages in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the KPITag building block to add a key performance indicator (KPI) to an application based on SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You must use the AINotice building block to display information related to AI features in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
You can use the AlwaysEditableField building block to define a field that is always displayed in edit mode, regardless of OData metadata and field controls, in SAP Fiori elements for OData V4.
